3010700.name: Navigating The Labyrinth Demo
3010700.description: The demo of Navigating The Labyrinth includes the starting town, two wilderness areas, the catacombs, and the main city of Zakros, representing about 40% of the game. Characters from the demo are stored in Steam cloud saves and can be used in the full version of the game.
3010700.supported_languages: 英语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 法语, 意大利语, 日语, 波兰语, 土耳其语
